title: equisetum altissimum
intro: Equisetum altissimum, also known as the giant horsetail, is a perennial plant that belongs to the class Equisetopsida and is often considered a living fossil due to its ancient lineage. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Equisetum altissimum include its ability to reduce blood pressure, improve liver function, and aid in weight loss. In herbal preparations, Equisetum altissimum can be made into tea, capsules, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
